name: Avocado-Tofu-Egg Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Very finely minced red onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Place vinegar, water, tofu and avocado in the jar of a blender or a food processor fitted with the steel blade attachment.
2. Puree until smooth. Transfer to a bowl.
3. Coarsely grate or finely chop the hard-cooked eggs.
4. Stir these, plus all remaining ingredients into the puree.
5. Cover tightly and chill.
